artifacts.title: Example HR | One platform to run your entire workforce
artifacts.raw_text:
One platform to run your entire workforce

Example HR is the all-in-one workforce platform. Run HR, payroll, contractors, and benefits for your whole team in one place. Stop juggling a dozen HR tools.

Book a demo

Everything your team needs

  • Global payroll in 150+ countries
  • Contractor management and compliance
  • Benefits administration

Trusted by modern teams

Join thousands of companies running their workforce on Example HR.

artifacts.title: Pricing | Example HR
artifacts.raw_text:
Pricing that scales with your workforce

Example HR is the all-in-one workforce platform priced per employee. Contact our sales team for a custom quote tailored to your team size and product mix.

Talk to sales

Plans include HR, payroll, and contractor management. Enterprise plans add advanced security and dedicated support.

artifacts.title: Example HR vs legacy HR suites
artifacts.raw_text:
Why teams switch from legacy HR systems to Example HR

Legacy HR systems force you to juggle a dozen disconnected HR tools. Example HR is the all-in-one workforce platform that replaces them with one system for HR, payroll, and contractors.

Book a demo
